channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: India-UK Economic and Social Security Agreements Enter into Force
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Wednesday celebrated the formal implementation of the India-United Kingdom Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA) and the landmark Social Security Agreement,...

item.title: Madlanga Commission to Hear Testimony from Vusimusi 'Cat' Matlala
item.description: The Madlanga commission of inquiry into allegations of impropriety in law enforcement is continuing its proceedings on Wednesday, July 15, 2026. The commission is expected to hear testimony from Vusim...

item.title: PM Shehbaz Urges FBR to Support Business Community for Economic Growth
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has directed the Federal Board of Revenue (FBR) to prioritize resolving issues faced by the business community, emphasizing their role as the backbone of Pakistan's econo...

item.title: Defense Team Argues Against Subpoenaing Sara Duterte's Financial Records in Impeachment Trial
item.description: The defense team of Vice President Sara Duterte has urged the Senate impeachment court to dismiss the House prosecution panel's request for subpoenas related to her bank and tax records. During the si...

item.title: Cyberattack on Australian health clinics exposes 21 patients' data
item.description: A significant cybersecurity breach has occurred at Partnered Health, an Australian healthcare provider, with personal information from 21 clinics across the nation being stolen. The attack highlights ...

item.title: British Council Closes Offices in Nine Countries Amid Financial Pressures
item.description: The British Council has decided to permanently close its offices in nine countries, including Tanzania and Mozambique, due to ongoing financial challenges. The organization received KSh 6.9 billion (£...

item.title: Trump's Actions Impact Intelligence Community and FISA Authorization
item.description: The article details how President Donald Trump's political maneuvers are disrupting the U.S. intelligence community's operations, particularly affecting the FISA Section 702 surveillance program. Fox ...

item.title: Kenya's Political Violence: The Rise of Goons in Elections
item.description: The article explores how Kenyan politicians are exploiting economic desperation by hiring armed youth, known as 'goons,' to suppress political dissent and intimidate opponents ahead of crucial electio...

item.title: Former UFC Champions Kamaru Usman and Dricus du Plessis Set for High-Stakes Showdown
item.description: Kamaru Usman, the former welterweight champion known as 'The Nigerian Nightmare,' will face Dricus du Plessis in a highly anticipated UFC Fight Night 281 event on July 18. This matchup marks a signifi...

item.title: Jeremy Clarkson's Cancer Diagnosis Revealed in Unscripted TV Moment
item.description: The article details how Jeremy Clarkson's unplanned revelation of his cancer diagnosis during a filmed segment of his TV show sparked widespread emotional responses. The director of the show, Kit, exp...

item.title: bilawal-expresses-concern-over-ajk-situation-s-impact-on-pakistan-s-reputation
item.description: PPP chairperson Bilawal Bhutto-Zardari has raised alarms about the deteriorating situation in Azad Jammu and Kashmir (AJK), warning that prolonged unrest could irreparably damage Pakistan's internatio...

item.title: Dangote Switches to US Dollar Pricing for Petrol Amid Economic Shifts
item.description: Dangote Refinery has shifted from using naira to US dollars for pricing petrol, sparking debates about economic stability and market dynamics. The decision comes after months of tension under the nair...

item.title: Kenya Airways' Boeing 777 returns after decade-long hiatus, sparks viral excitement
item.description: Kenya Airways has welcomed back its Boeing 777-300ER aircraft after a decade-long sublease with Turkish Airlines, sparking a viral moment on social media. Popular TikToker Mbote Njogu shared an excite...

item.title: The Summer of Ludd Festival: A Modern Luddite Movement Against Tech Overreach
item.description: The article explores the Summer of Ludd, a Luddite festival in New York that critiques Big Tech's impact on society. Organized by a puppet named Gowanus, the event promotes disconnection from digital ...

item.title: Fremantle's AFL Premierships Potential: A Closer Look at Their Chances
item.description: The article explores Fremantle's potential to secure an AFL premiership, analyzing their current position and historical context. Since 2000, only seven teams were in as strong a position as the Docke...

item.title: Rachel Reeves Prioritizes EU Ties Over Other Alliances in Final Chancellor Speech
item.description: In her anticipated final major speech as Chancellor, Rachel Reeves emphasized that the UK’s relationship with the European Union remains the most critical alliance for national security and economic s...

item.title: DepEd Expands School Safety Measures with Nationwide Active Threat Drills
item.description: The Department of Education (DepEd) is conducting nationwide active threat drills as part of the National Safe Schools Summit, aimed at enhancing preparedness and ensuring student safety in schools. T...

item.title: Kanga Cup: Kids and Coaches Navigate Wet Pitches and Celebrations

item.title: Sarmiento Appointed to GPH Peace Panel for MILF Negotiations
item.description: Mel Senen Sarmiento was appointed as the concurrent chairperson of the Government of the Philippines (GPH) peace panel for the Mindanao Islamic Liberation Front (MILF) peace process, following the res...

item.title: Data Breach at India's Largest Nuclear Plant Reveals Sensitive Information
item.description: A significant data breach has occurred at India's Kudankulam Nuclear Power Plant, with sensitive files including blueprints, supplier details, and insurance policies leaked online by the ransomware gr...
